title: AI Search: Understanding and tracking visibility with SE Ranking’s toolkit: Tracking AI visibility with SE Ranking’s toolkit

meta.description: This course shows you how AI search works across systems like Google’s AI experiences, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and more. You’ll learn how AI answers are generated, what drives visibility inside them, and how to use that knowledge to improve research, strategy, and reporting in your day-to-day SEO work.

textPreview:
AI Search: Understanding and tracking visibility with SE Ranking’s toolkit

Learn how to confidently use AI search insights and SE Ranking’s AI Search Toolkit to speed up keyword research, competitive analysis, and content optimization.
